varieties.name: Purple Top White Globe
varieties.origin: Southern United States, early 19th century (introduced to Australia late 1800s)
varieties.traits: Large, smooth, round roots 10-15cm diameter; purple crown above soil, white below
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pure white, fine-grained, crisp, mild pungency
varieties.yield_notes: High productivity, 100-150kg per 10 square metres in subtropics

varieties.name: Hakurei (Tokyo Market)
varieties.origin: Japan, 20th century hybrid development
varieties.traits: Small, pure white, 5-7cm diameter; smooth skin, hairless green tops
varieties.flesh_fruit: Crisp, sweet, mild flavor similar to apple; excellent raw
varieties.yield_notes: Fast-maturing (35-40 days), multiple successive plantings possible

varieties.name: Tokyo Cross F1
varieties.origin: Japan, RHS Award of Garden Merit winner
varieties.traits: Pure white globe, 8-15cm diameter; uniform size
varieties.flesh_fruit: Mild, sweet, crispy texture

varieties.name: Golden Ball (Orange Jelly)
varieties.origin: France/England, registered 1855 as Robertson's Golden Ball
varieties.traits: Perfectly globe-shaped, bright golden-yellow skin, 10-12cm diameter
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pale amber-yellow, fine-textured, sweet with pleasant bitter almond aftertaste

varieties.name: Snowball (White Egg)
varieties.origin: United States, 19th century heirloom
varieties.traits: Egg-shaped, pure white, 10-12cm; greenish-white at crown
varieties.flesh_fruit: Snowy white, tender, very juicy with high water content, sweet

varieties.name: Purple Top Milan
varieties.origin: Italy (Milan), introduced before 1888
varieties.traits: Flat to globe-shaped, creamy-white with bright purple-red shoulders
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pure white, fine-grained, sweet and mild, crisp and succulent
varieties.growing_notes: Classic Italian heirloom, quick-maturing ideal for humid subtropical climates as 'catch crop' between slower vegetables. Plant March-August for cooler season growing. Excellent for baby turnips. Suited to subtropical UK climate, performs similarly in humid subtropical climates autumn/winter.
varieties.availability: The Seed Collection, specialty heirloom suppliers in Australia

varieties.name: Shogoin
varieties.origin: Japan, one of oldest traditional Japanese varieties
varieties.traits: Large globe-shaped white roots, 15-20cm wide; tall leafy tops 45-50cm
varieties.flesh_fruit: Fine-grained, mild, delicate sweet flavor
varieties.yield_notes: Dual-purpose for roots (55-70 days) and greens (30-35 days)

varieties.name: Leaf Turnip (Greens Only)
varieties.origin: Various Asian origins
varieties.traits: Grown exclusively for tender leafy greens; minimal root development
varieties.flesh_fruit: Tender green leaves similar to collards with mild spicy cabbage-radish flavor

varieties.name: Seven Top (Southern Prize)
varieties.origin: Southern United States, pre-1880
varieties.traits: Grown exclusively for greens; roots tough, woody, inedible
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dark green, large, mildly flavored nutritious leaves

varieties.name: Just Right F1
varieties.origin: United States, All American Selection award winner
varieties.traits: Semi-globe white roots, 12-15cm; maintains quality at larger size
varieties.flesh_fruit: Smooth white, crisp, mild
varieties.yield_notes: 60-70 days, hybrid vigor provides uniform production

varieties.name: Manchester Market
varieties.origin: England (Manchester)
varieties.traits: Globe-shaped, 8-12cm; creamy-white with light green top
varieties.flesh_fruit: Crisp white flesh with peppery flavor when mature

varieties.name: Early Milan Red Top
varieties.origin: Italy, adapted for Indian tropical cultivation
varieties.traits: Deep flat roots with purplish-red top, white underneath; small 4-6 sessile leaves
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pure white, well-grained, crisp, mildly pungent
varieties.yield_notes: Extra early, very high yielding for tropical conditions
varieties.growing_notes: Recommended for Tropical monsoon cooler season (November-January). More heat-tolerant than European types. Quick maturity allows harvest before monsoon onset. Suitable for tropical monsoon climates region when planted in winter months. Performs well in well-drained sandy loam typical of tropical monsoon climates river valleys.
varieties.availability: tropical monsoon climates Agricultural University sources, Indian agricultural seed suppliers, Mahyco, Advanta

varieties.name: L 1 (Local White) 🌱
varieties.origin: India, developed for tropical/subtropical regions
varieties.traits: Round, pure white roots, smooth skin, crisp texture
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, crisp, mild flavor

varieties.name: Pusa Chandrima 🌱
varieties.origin: IARI New Delhi, developed for Indian conditions
varieties.traits: Globe-shaped, pure white skin and flesh
varieties.flesh_fruit: Crisp, pure white, mildly sweet

varieties.name: Pusa Swarnima 🌱
varieties.origin: IARI Regional Station, Katrain (developed for hills and subtropics)
varieties.traits: Flattish round, creamy-yellow skin; medium tops with moderately cut leaves
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pale amber, fine texture, excellent flavor

varieties.name: Pusa Sweti 🌱
varieties.origin: IARI, developed for Indian subtropical regions
varieties.traits: Attractive white roots
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, tender

varieties.name: Punjab Safed 4 🌱
varieties.origin: Japan (Tokyo, Hakurei strains)
varieties.traits: Small white globe turnips, 5-8cm diameter
varieties.flesh_fruit: Sweet, crisp, mild; excellent raw
varieties.growing_notes: Recommended for Punjab/Haryana but worth trial in tropical monsoon climates during dry season. More heat-tolerant than temperate types. Asiatic breeding background suits warmer conditions. Trial planting in tropical monsoon climates December-January. May require irrigation management in Tropical monsoon high humidity.
varieties.availability: Punjab Agricultural University, North Indian seed suppliers, some availability through inter-state agricultural networks

varieties.name: Golden Ball
varieties.origin: Historical European variety, adapted globally
varieties.traits: Globe-shaped, golden-yellow, 8-12cm
varieties.flesh_fruit: Bright golden yellow, fine-grained, sweet mild flavor

varieties.name: Snowball (Local adaptation)
varieties.origin: Traditional variety with Indian cultivation history
varieties.traits: Round to globe-shaped, white, smooth
varieties.flesh_fruit: White, tender, mild sweet flavor

varieties.name: Local Red Round (Tropical type) 🌱
varieties.origin: India, tropical breeding background
varieties.traits: Red skin varieties adapted to warmer conditions
varieties.flesh_fruit: White flesh with variable rose coloring

varieties.name: Turnip Greens Varieties
varieties.origin: Various, selected for leaf production in warm climates
varieties.traits: Grown primarily for edible leaves; minimal root development
varieties.flesh_fruit: Tender, nutritious greens with mild peppery flavor
